questions.q: In April 2026, the Canada Revenue Agency was revealed to have paid out another bogus income tax refund, this time to a B.C. businesswoman. How much was the refund?
A New Democratic Party (NDP) motion seeking unanimous consent to urge a nationwide ban on what specific retail practice was defeated in the House of Commons in mid-April 2026?
In April 2026, a Canadian military police officer filed a lawsuit against Ottawa and an American manufacturer after being wounded by the accidental discharge of what newly issued handgun?
According to April 2026 Ministry of Education data, what percentage of Ontario high school students regularly attended class to meet the attendance standard during the most recent school year?
A newly released April 2026 report from the Canadian Federation of Independent Business (CFIB) warned that Canada is currently experiencing an 'entrepreneurial drought' because:
options: The economy is losing businesses faster than it can create new ones
Venture capital funding has dropped to zero
All corporate tax rates were doubled
questions.correctText: The economy is losing businesses faster than it can create new ones
